disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: CIDRAP 报道邮轮关联汉坦病毒疫情增至 13 例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-ridden MV Hondius will set sail again — and much sooner than you may expect - New York Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-ridden MV Hondius will set sail again — and much sooner than you may expect New York Post
updates.summary_zh: 《纽约邮报》称 MV Hondius 邮轮将提前复航。

updates.title_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster - Morocco World News
updates.body_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster Morocco World News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 报告邮轮聚集性汉坦病毒病例达 13 例。

updates.title_en: Sin nombre hantavirus strain still focus for Southwest tribes despite Andes strain - Tucson Sentinel
updates.body_en: Sin nombre hantavirus strain still focus for Southwest tribes despite Andes strain Tucson Sentinel
updates.summary_zh: 美国西南部落仍关注辛诺柏汉坦病毒株。

updates.title_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked - People.com
updates.body_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked People.com
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius 邮轮将在疫情后 34 天继续航行。

updates.title_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK - Pharmacy Business
updates.body_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK Pharmacy Business
updates.summary_zh: 英国卫生官员监测汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO - Mint
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO Mint
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙MV Hondius邮轮乘客确诊，病例数达13例，WHO称情况稳定。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 - politico.eu
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 politico.eu
updates.summary_zh: 与邮轮疫情相关的汉坦病毒病例升至13例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says NBC News Passenger Tests Positive For Hantavirus Weeks After Leaving Infected Cruise Ship (Latest Updates) Forbes Spanish national evacuated from hantavirus cruise ship tests positive Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙新增1例，邮轮疫情病例升至13例，WHO确认。

updates.title_en: Repatriation flight video falsely shared as evidence of staged hantavirus crisis - AFP Fact Check
updates.body_en: Repatriation flight video falsely shared as evidence of staged hantavirus crisis AFP Fact Check
updates.summary_zh: 法新社事实核查：撤侨航班视频被误传为汉坦病毒危机证据。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On Cruise Ship Triggers Intensive Cleaning Measures - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak On Cruise Ship Triggers Intensive Cleaning Measures NDTV
updates.summary_zh: NDTV报道邮轮汉坦病毒爆发引发强化清洁措施。

updates.title_en: Kennedy offers legal shield to develop hantavirus treatment - Axios
updates.body_en: Kennedy offers legal shield to develop hantavirus treatment Axios
updates.summary_zh: Axios报道肯尼迪提供法律保护以开发汉坦病毒疗法。

updates.title_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine - Global News
updates.body_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine Global News
updates.summary_zh: 全球新闻：萨斯卡通研究人员进行汉坦病毒疫苗动物试验早期阶段。

updates.title_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak - AspenTimes.com
updates.body_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak AspenTimes.com
updates.summary_zh: 皮特金县确认当地汉坦病毒毒株与邮轮爆发不同。
